no: Various tweaks by Graion Dilach. Economy adjustments (gold, jewellery, merchant prices, ammo stacks), scroll distribution, creature artwork, utility features. Most groups are pick-one alternatives.

conflicts.reason: Both modify mxsplwis.2da WIS bonus spell table
Both modify mxsplwis.2da. Last installed wins. Install HT before ZG.
conflicts.source: Original note had wrong HT cn:7 (APR); actual WIS component is cn:12, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both modify bonus spell slot tables
conflicts.theirComps: #110 Stat-based Bonus Spell Slots #121 #122 5E Caster Bonus

conflicts.reason: ZGT cn:101 grants ranger spell slots to Cleric-Ranger multiclass via CLAB. Only interacts with IWDification cn:170 (Ranger Spell Progression) which replaces mxsplran.2da. IWDification cn:170 No conflict.
conflicts.theirComps: #170 Ranger Spell Progression (NOT in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: Both overwrite mxsplwis.2da (WIS bonus spell table). Last installed wins.

sum: Various tweaks presented by Graion Dilach for games on the Infinity Engine.

co.n: Mixed PnP-BG wisdom-based bonus spells table
co.tp2n: Mixed PnP-BG wisdom-based bonus spells table
co.no: Overwrites mxsplwis.2da with mixed PnP-BG wisdom bonus spells table. Hard COPY — no mod detection. Conflicts with cdtweaks, HouseTweaks, SubtleD Stat Overhauls, Bart_Tweaks cn:3030.

co.n: Grant Ranger spell slots to Cleric-Ranger multiclasses
co.tp2n: Grant Ranger spell slots to Cleric-Ranger multiclasses
co.no: Grants ranger spell slots to Cleric-Ranger multiclass via CLAB modification. Install after any mod that changes ranger spell progression (mxsplran.2da).

co.tp2n: Change Worgs to use IWD2 artwork
co.no: Replaces worg creature animations with IWD2 artwork. Cosmetic only.
